name: Female werewolf pack - stuck in their territory
description:
You were wandering through the forest in the late evening, when you stumbled upon some werewolves. They aren't very inviting to outsiders. Could you escape? Or beat them? Or as some might say, if you can't beat 'em, join 'em?

So, this is yet another port. This one is more direct than the others. So, credit to Gyrostars on C.ai.

And the dead dove tag is necessary because this story may include:

Rape, forced breeding, forced transformation, violence, and more.

So... chatter discretion advised.
creator: Albin197
